channel.title: Chart Breakers & Star Stories
channel.itunes:author: Family TVR
channel.itunes:summary: Did your favorite artist just break a record or a heart? The charts are screaming, and we have the inside story you won't hear anywhere else.
channel.description: The latest music trends, chart updates, and star stories from Billboard and beyond. Stay updated with the Pop Culture.

item.title: D4vd Arrested for Alleged Murder of Celeste Rivas | Billboard News
item.description:
[Eerie music fades out, and the host's voice takes over]
Host: "Welcome back to our show, where we're covering the latest developments in the music world. Today, we're discussing a shocking arrest in the hip-hop community. Rapper D4vd, known for his hit song 'Romantic Homicide', has been taken into custody by the LAPD on suspicion of murder."
[Pause for a brief moment]
Host: "The alleged victim is 13-year-old Celeste Rivas, who went missing from her home in Lake Elsinore, California, back in April 2024. Tragically, her partially dismembered and decomposed body was found in the front trunk of a Tesla registered to D4vd in September."
[Serious tone]
Host: "D4vd's attorneys have released a statement, saying they will 'vigorously defend' his innocence, claiming that the evidence will show he did not murder Celeste Rivas Hernandez and was not the cause of her death. However, the LAPD is holding him without bail, and his case will be presented to the District Attorney's office on Monday for filing consideration."
[Closing music starts playing]
Host: "We'll continue to follow this case and provide updates as more information becomes available. For now, that's all we have. Thank you for tuning in."
